issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks in the post-referral workflow. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred continued to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of stopping enrollment. The issue affected multiple HAs who received erroneous tasks for lost or transferred deals. A filter tweak was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO instead of the newly assigned one. The affected deal showed Paul as the LO in automated emails when it should have been Julie Yocum. The issue was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reference the correct loan officer and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved from Offer Accepted back to a prior stage and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria for Offer Accepted was missing from the workflow configuration. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving tasks. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and confirmed fixed. Root cause was not explicitly stated but was likely a HubSpot-side configuration issue.
issues.workaround: Manually send closing info collection emails and enroll affected MRC deals into the TC workflow for any deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window.
